scripts.check: pnpm run check:structure && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint:py && pnpm run format:py:check && turbo run lint typecheck test build
scripts.format:py: cd services/agent_server && uv run ruff format . ../../libs/doudou-agent-sdk
scripts.format:py:check: cd services/agent_server && uv run ruff format --check . ../../libs/doudou-agent-sdk
scripts.lint:py: cd services/agent_server && uv run ruff check . ../../libs/doudou-agent-sdk
scripts.test: pnpm run check:structure && turbo run test
